author: developeruche
content:
This was introduced to address the latency issues hindering real-time proving at the “current chain head.” It evaluates `engine_newPayloadWithWitness` and summarizes the discussions and conclusions reached in this thread.

<#1463293742457815329> 

This newly introduced REST endpoint re-implements `engine_newPayloadV5`. In addition to returning the `PayloadStatus`, it also returns the `ExecutionWitness`, serialized in SSZ format and transported over HTTP rather than JSON-RPC.

This API configuration enables the method to be called even with the worst-case, spec-compliant block in about 4 seconds (round-trip from the CL perspective).

To gather data, this proposed API change was implemented in Ethrex and Lighthouse. More details can be found in the following PR:

https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/773




cc: <@427491045308235776>  <@402080271563751435> <@774033563732541451>
